title: Vibe Coding
style: vocal-forward, spacious, lo-fi hip-hop with glitchy electronic elements, playful and futuristic, chopped synths plus glitchy beats and deep sub bass and digital textures, male vocal playful and rhythmic with vocoder accents, studio quality futuristic lo-fi mix, 95 BPM, key of Gm, reference Holo Coves electronic textures, reference Jacob Collier experimentalism
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Never wrote a line of code before last spring
Now I'm shipping features, building everything
Prompt and pray and iterate and test
Claude and Cursor doing all the rest
The engineers are sweating, "that's not clean"
But the users? They don't care what's behind the screen

[Chorus]
Vibe coding, vibe coding
Don't read the code, just feel the flow
Vibe coding, vibe coding
Ship it before the model gets to know
That you have no idea what you're doing
But it works and that's the point
Vibe coding

[Verse 2]
Lovable hit two hundred mil in a year
Less than a hundred people, six billion — hear
Five hundred builders wrote to Lenny's thread
"I shipped a product" — none of them had read
A single line of code before the wave
Democratized the making, broke the gate

[Chorus]
Vibe coding, vibe coding
Don't read the code, just feel the flow
Vibe coding, vibe coding
Ship it before the model gets to know
That you have no idea what you're doing
But it works and that's the point
Vibe coding

[Outro]
Welcome to the era
Where everyone can build
Vibe coding

source.title: The rise of the vibe coder
